taxonomy: Glossorhyncha tenuis is a type of flowering plant. It belongs to the family Acanthaceae. Within this family, Glossorhyncha tenuis is classified under the genus Glossorhyncha. The classification of this plant follows the Linnaean system of taxonomy. As a member of Acanthaceae, Glossorhyncha tenuis is part of the order Lamiales.
